HSR_ANCIENTS_STS2-SNAKE_MASK.description: Upon pickup, choose [blue]3[/blue] cards in your [gold]Deck[/gold]. [gold]Enchant[/gold] them with [purple]Slither[/purple].
HSR_ANCIENTS_STS2-SNAKE_MASK.flavor: A mask the resembles a legendary serpent found deep in the Spire
HSR_ANCIENTS_STS2-SNAKE_MASK.title: Snake Mask
HSR_ANCIENTS_STS2-PAIR_OF_ACES.descripti: At the start of combat, choose [blue]2[/blue] cards from your draw pile. Randomly exhaust one and add the other to your [gold]Hand[/gold]. The one added to your [gold]Hand[/gold] is free to play this turn.
HSR_ANCIENTS_STS2-PAIR_OF_ACES.title: Pair Of Aces
HSR_ANCIENTS_STS2-PAIR_OF_ACES.selection: Select 2 cards, one will be Exhausted and one will be added to your Hand
HSR_ANCIENTS_STS2-WORLDS_FUNNIEST_JOKE.d: Upon pickup, add [blue]1[/blue] [red]Hideous Laughter[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of each turn.
HSR_ANCIENTS_STS2-SPARKLING_PLUSHIE.desc: Upon pickup, add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Big Red Button[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold]
HSR_ANCIENTS_STS2-SPARKLING_PLUSHIE.flav: A doll resembeling a michevious figure. It seems very dangerous, or very hugable, your not sure.
